ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform the device belongs to */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the device is installed */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Approval status of the device (0 = not approved, 1 = approved) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address assigned to the device */,
  "added_on" TEXT /* Date and time the device was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the device information was last modified */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "warranty_expiry_date" TEXT /* Warranty expiry date of the device */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Team or individual responsible for the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the platform */,
  "support_contact" TEXT /* Contact for platform support */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time the platform was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., data center, office) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the log entry belongs to */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time the log entry was created */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., config change, maintenance) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the log entry */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the log entry (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network engineer, IT admin, support staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the device was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, configure, maintain) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used for access (e.g., browser and device information) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the configuration */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "rollback_possible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version can be rolled back */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_versions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the configuration data */,
  "config_date" TEXT /* Date and time the configuration was applied */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who applied the configuration */,
  "configuration_type" TEXT /* Type of configuration (e.g., initial, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the maintenance activity belongs to */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date and time the maintenance activity was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine check, repair) */,
  "maintenance_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_maintenance_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_maintenance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the performance record belongs to */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date and time the performance metrics were recorded */,
  "up_time" INTEGER /* Uptime of the device in minutes */,
  "down_time" INTEGER /* Downtime of the device in minutes */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency in milliseconds */,
  "packet_loss" REAL /* Packet loss percentage */,
  "throughput" REAL /* Data throughput rate in Mbps */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage percentage */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage percentage */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage percentage */,
  "network_traffic" TEXT /* Network traffic in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_performance_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
